title: ZombieLand
description: One city. Thousands of undead. Your only goal is to survive one more night against hunger, thirst, and the freezing cold.
body:
![ZombieLand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d31294ff21489a6602056873287a837e158cf4.png)

Welcome to a world that has forgotten peace.
This modpack transforms Minecraft into a gritty, post-apocalyptic survival simulator. You will find yourself among the ruins of cities where nature is slowly reclaiming its own, and the shadows are crawling with danger.

# Core Gameplay Pillars:
- **Next-Gen Combat**: Forget about simple spam-clicking. Powered by [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight), combat requires timing, dodging, and mastery. Each weapon features unique animations and tactical depth.
- **A Living, Lethal World**: [The Lost Cities](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-lost-cities) mod creates an atmosphere of total desolation. Explore abandoned offices, subways, and malls. But beware: [Zombie Awareness](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombie-awareness) makes the undead incredibly sharp—they will track your torchlight and the scent of your blood.
- **Biological Threats**: Your body is your greatest asset and your biggest weakness. You must battle extreme temperatures ([Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat)), find clean drinking water ([Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken)), and maintain a balanced diet to stay alive.
- **The Art of Survival Cooking**: [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) is essential here. It's the only way to prepare high-calorie meals that provide the stamina and buffs needed for raids into high-risk zones.
- **Total Immersion**: Realistic [Sound Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), enhanced visual damage effects, and a revamped HUD ensure 100% immersion. You will literally feel the dread as footsteps echo through the hollow halls.
#
